§6Super-Laminar Fluiduct§f

§aMaximum fluid throughput for endgame fluid distribution networks and high-volume refinery output!§f

§bSuper-Laminar Fluiducts§f are the highest-tier fluid duct, offering the best possible throughput. They are crafted with §bEnderium§f and are required for any large-scale fluid operation that exceeds the limits of Signalum-Plated networks.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Transparent§f: §e1× Enderium Ingot§f + §e1× Glass§f → §e6× Super-Laminar Fluiduct§f.
§b• Opaque§f: §e1× Enderium Ingot§f + §e1× Lead Ingot§f → §e6× Super-Laminar Fluiduct (Opaque)§f.

§6Endgame Use Cases§f:
- Refinery outputs exceeding §e10,000 mB/tick§f per side.
- §bMagmatic Dynamo§f coolant loops with §bGelid Cryotheum§f.
- §bNuclearcraft§f coolant loops between high-pressure heat exchangers.

§eTip§f: Super-Laminar Fluiducts are the only duct tier that can keep up with a fully-fueled §bMagmatic Dynamo§f burning §bBlazing Pyrotheum§f. Plan for them at the very end of your duct line.
